Home Impact Crisis Team Donate

Partnerships

Partner with Meeting TENTS

Meeting TENTS works as a catalyst — accelerating the impact of local partners so health improvements continue long after our projects end. We partner with clinics, universities, faith-based organizations, NGOs, and Ministries of Health to deliver disease prevention, health promotion, and access to care.

How we partner

We don't parachute in with prepackaged solutions. We listen, learn, and build alongside the organizations already doing the work.

Technical Assistance

Research & Evaluation

We provide research support, program evaluation, and data-driven guidance to help partners measure what works and refine their approach.

Capacity Building

Train-the-Trainer

Our leadership development model equips local health workers and community leaders with the skills to sustain programs independently.

Implementation

Program Support

From HIV testing campaigns in the Philippines to malaria prevention in Uganda, we work side-by-side with partners to implement and scale programs.

Who we work with

Meeting TENTS partners with organizations across three countries — including the Department of Health in the Philippines, local clinics and hospitals, universities, faith-based organizations, and community health networks. Whether you're a church looking to connect your mission work to measurable health outcomes, a clinic seeking research support, or an NGO looking for a like-minded collaborator — we'd love to hear from you.

"Meeting TENTS operates as a catalyst — accelerating and multiplying the impact of local partners by providing technical assistance, research, leadership development, and program implementation support."

Ready to partner?

Reach out to discuss how we can work together toward healthier communities.

Get in touch
